capabilities_used.evidence: [2024-12-25] "Time from TOP to TOP = 1400 days avg... TOP will be between September - October 2025 $BTC"；[2025-08-28] "All past bull markets lasted 1,060 days"；[2026-01-29] "4-year cycle is over, but if not Today is day 115 of the bear market"。他反复用历史周期长度来推演顶部/熊市进度。

[2024-01-29] "80 days for the halving"；[2024-06-24] "+371% up from bottom -17% from ATH... it is a market cycle"；[2024-05-29] "Boring June-July... Uptrend resume in August... Parabolic trend all Q4"。他明显把减半后的阶段切分为盘整、恢复上涨、抛物线加速。

[2025-05-26] "nobody cares about $BTC price, we just want an altseason"；[2025-05-22] "Remember: $BTC cool off = Altcoins pump"；[2025-01-31] "we will see multiple altseasons, 1-5 narratives at a time"。他经常把 BTC 横盘/冷却视为山寨轮动触发器。

图7是 BTC 在蓝色箱体底部附近反复测试的区间图；图3是大级别上涨后进入右侧红色整理箱；[2026-02-24] "this is just a range Range low is broken, so it's a 'no trade zone' for me. I'll wait for a reclaim to trade a range low to mid range move"。他非常强调区间低点、箱体边界和中轴交易。
[2025-03-27] "Meanwhile $ETH ranging between 2-4k for 1500 days"；[2025-12-25] "40 days accumulation, compression and HL's... first move after a consolidation tends to be a trap"；多张图都先画长时间横盘/压缩，再讨论方向。
[2024-12-27] "Q1 - Slow grind up + starting of parabola Q2 - Parabolic move + TOP"；[2024-05-29] "Parabolic trend all Q4"；图1、图4都直接画出后续抛物线式加速路径。他不仅预期抛物线阶段，还把它当周期尾声特征。
[2025-01-30] "I have never seen a double bottom as clear as this one in my entire life. $1 is the magnet. $DSYNC"；[2025-01-30] "3000 was the bottom. $ETH"。双底/二次探底是他高频使用的底部确认框架。

[2024-09-30] "Everyone is a gangster until it's time to buy the dip."；[2025-03-30] "They will try to shake you out, but this is the bottom"；[2025-12-25] "first move after a consolidation tends to be a trap"。他经常把下破/先手突破解释为扫止损和洗盘，而非趋势确认。

[2025-12-25] "Most impatient ones will chase the breakout. Be careful, first move after a consolidation tends to be a trap"；[2024-05-29] "June-July (chop + some traps for both sides)"。他反复提醒盘整后的第一脚是假突破概率高。
图7与图4都用蓝色水平带标记前结构位，价格回踩该带后企稳/等待收复；[2026-02-24] "I'll wait for a reclaim"。这类“破位后收回/支撑阻力互换”是他常见画图方式。
[2025-05-27] "Direction = ⬆️ $ETH"；[2024-10-29] "Here we go... we will take off shortly. $BTC"；图1、图4都是在中继整理后直接延续主升的路径推演。他默认在牛市里优先寻找顺势延续。

[2025-02-23] "Just opened an $ETH long. Risk: $2500 Reward: $12500 Planning to double position size if we find acceptance above 2.9k"；[2026-02-24] "Range low is broken, so it's a 'no trade zone' for me"。说明他会明确失效位，并在未收复前放弃交易。
[2025-02-23] 公开给出 "$ETH long" 的固定风险与收益比："Risk: $2500 Reward: $12500"，体现他会先框定亏损额度，再考虑加仓条件。
图1在回调结构上明确标出回撤层级，虽然图上写的是 0.5，但整体框架就是用斐波回撤区来找二次起涨位置；这说明他会用回撤比率辅助判断支撑区。
推文中较少直接提均线，但其“reclaim/acceptance above level”语言与结构收复逻辑高度一致；更偏价格结构而非指标，因此权重较低。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Box Consolidation Expansion
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify long horizontal consolidation or compression boxes and project a directional expansion after enough time has been spent building energy inside the box.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别长时间横向箱体或压缩区，认为价格在箱内蓄能，盘整越久，后续离开箱体后的扩张越大。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] "The bigger the consolidation, the bigger the expansion. $BTC"；[2024-04-30] "This long consolidation will be the last of this bull market"；图1、图4、图7都先画箱体/压缩区再画扩张路径。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Crypto Calendar Seasonality
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use repeated monthly return tendencies such as weak September and strong October/Q4 to shape directional bias and timing.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 利用月份收益分布形成方向偏置，例如 9 月偏弱、10 月和 Q4 偏强，用于择时。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-08-30] "September is bad October is good $BTC"；图5、图6都是月度回报热力图，并高亮了 9-10 月和 Q4。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Level Reclaim With Acceptance
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 关键位收复并站稳触发
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Do not trade the first touch after a breakdown; wait for price to reclaim a lost level and show acceptance above it before entering.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 关键位跌破后不急于抄底，等待价格重新收复失守位置并出现站稳/接受，再启动交易。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-02-23] "Planning to double position size if we find acceptance above 2.9k"；[2026-02-24] "Range low is broken... I'll wait for a reclaim"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: ATH Disbelief Divergence
new_capabilities_proposed.description: When price is near or at all-time highs but sentiment remains muted or bearish, treat it as a bullish continuation sign rather than a top.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当价格接近或创出历史新高，但市场情绪依旧冷淡或悲观时，将其视为看多延续而非见顶信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-05-22] "New ATH + silence = All sidelined"；[2025-06-30] "It's the first time $BTC is at ATH levels but sentiment is like we are in a bear market"。

personal_quirks.quote: They will try to shake you out, but this is the bottom. Save the tweet. $BTC
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他把剧烈回撤和恐慌更多解释为洗盘，而不是趋势终结；偏向在恐慌中找底。

personal_quirks.quote: The bigger the consolidation, the bigger the expansion. $BTC
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 长时间盘整不是坏事，而是趋势下一段大行情的蓄能过程。

personal_quirks.quote: Everyone is a gangster until it's time to buy the dip.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 真正的优势来自在市场最难受的时候执行，而不是事后口嗨。

personal_quirks.quote: Emotions aside, this is just a range. Range low is broken, so it's a 'no trade zone' for me. I'll wait for a reclaim to trade a range low to mid range move
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先做结构分类；区间失守后不交易，等收复确认再回到区间逻辑。

personal_quirks.quote: Most impatient ones will chase the breakout. Be careful, first move after a consolidation tends to be a trap
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 盘整后的第一脚突破不追，优先提防假动作和诱多/诱空。

unique_traits: 他和很多只会画形态的 TA 交易员不同，明显把“周期时间框架 + 箱体结构 + 市场情绪反身性”揉在一起用，尤其擅长把漫长盘整解释成牛市中继。另一个鲜明特征是强烈的多头叙事与逆向情绪表达：他经常在市场怀疑、麻木、回撤时给出高置信底部/延续判断，并把 ALT season 轮动视为 BTC 周期的自然外溢。

low_conviction_phrases: I could be wrong, time will tell
